non_hand_authored_exclusions.refresh_trigger: Refresh with the pinned npm workflow when package.json dependency metadata changes, then review the lock diff.
Refresh with a locked Cargo dependency command when a Cargo manifest changes, then review the lock diff.
Run npm run sqlx:prepare when checked SQL or migrations change, then review the metadata diff.

non_hand_authored_exclusions.reason: Generated platform schema and capability output.
non_hand_authored_exclusions.refresh_trigger: Regenerate after Tauri configuration or capability changes, then review the schema diff.
Refresh only when the pinned Vale style source changes, then review the vendored diff.

exceptions.reason: Pre-canonical hand-authored file exceeds a hard ceiling; this exact no-growth ratchet preserves the measured baseline until a cohesive split.
exceptions.retirement_condition: Split the file below both canonical hard ceilings and remove this exception in the same change.
